paths.summary: This path uses the highest-scoring API for fetching interest rates and leverages a chat completion API for generating loan summaries and sending them to users.

steps.action: Fetch current interest rates from a financial data API
steps.why: This API has the highest score (8.5) and is suitable for fetching financial data.

steps.action: Simulate repayment plans using a loan calculation API
steps.why: This API has a high score (6.0) and can handle complex calculations.

steps.action: Generate loan summaries based on the simulation results
steps.why: This API can generate detailed summaries based on the simulation results.

steps.action: Send loan summaries to users via an email or notification API
steps.why: This API can handle the communication aspect of sending summaries to users.

subtask_coverage.description: Fetch current interest rates from a financial data API
Simulate repayment plans using a loan calculation API
Generate loan summaries based on the simulation results
Send loan summaries to users via an email or notification API

overall_rationale: These paths leverage the highest-scoring APIs for fetching interest rates and generating loan summaries. The paths differ in their approach to generating summaries (text-based vs. image-based) and the APIs used for sending notifications. The first path uses a single high-scoring API for multiple steps, while the other paths use different APIs for generating summaries and sending notifications, offering a trade-off between simplicity and specialization.
